_comment: Standalone (non-store) games: free/itch/modpack titles with no Steam/GOG/Epic id, detected by probing a fixed save path (same path-template + first-existing-wins rules as the emulator manifest). Placeholders: {APPDATA} {LOCALAPPDATA} {DOCUMENTS} {SAVEDGAMES} {HOME} {USERPROFILE} {APPSUPPORT} {XDG_DATA} {XDG_CONFIG}. A path that doesn't exist simply won't match.
